name: Prawns with Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: the California Culinary Academy Preparation Time: 0:25
1. Wash, peel, and devein the prawns. Place them in a large saucepan with white wine. Cook over medium-high heat until they turn bright pink. Set aside.
2. In a small bowl, mix together peanut butter and safflower oil until smooth. Add honey, soy or tamari, rice vinegar, dark sesame oil, cayenne pepper, green onion, coriander, and cumin. Mix well.
3. Add the prawns and sauce to the saucepan. Reheat over medium heat until warmed through.
4. Serve over steamed rice if desired.
